title: plagiobothrys canescens var. canescens
intro: Plagiobothrys canescens var. canescens, also known as White Fescue or Fescue Grass, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe sore throats and coughs. The health benefits of Plagiobothrys canescens var. canescens include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and tinctures, are commonly used to treat various health issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
